leadText: Shadow Panic (Japanese: ダークパニック Dark Panic) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Panic confuses all opponents. Shadow Panic is a sound-based move , so it cannot affect Pokémon with Soundproof . As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Panic cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy aura emanates to cause a confuse condition.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Panic is the only Shadow move to be a sound-based move.
